zh.Empingham, Rutlandshire, England: 英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾平加姆

zh.Empingham, Oakham, Rutlandshire, England: 英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾平加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Normanville於大約1168年出生在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾平加姆時，他的父親Sir Ralph II De Normanville30歲，母親Maud Bures23歲。他於1194年與Avicia在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾平加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1225年12月30日在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Normanville于大约1168年出生在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾平加姆时，他的父亲Sir Ralph II De Normanville30岁，母亲Maud Bures23岁。他于1194年与Avicia在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾平加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1225年12月30日在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Normanville was born about 1168, in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph II De Normanville, was 30 and his mother, Maud Bures, was 23. He married Avicia in 1194, in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 30 December 1225, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Normanville est né environ 1168, à Empingham, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph II De Normanville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud Bures, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Avicia en 1194, à Empingham, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 décembre 1225, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Normanville um 1168 in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph II De Normanville 30 und seine Mutter Maud Bures 23. Er hat 1194 in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom Avicia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. Dezember 1225 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Normanville è nato il circa 1168 nel Empingham, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ralph II De Normanville, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Maud Bures, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Avicia nel 1194, nel Empingham, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 dicembre 1225, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Normanvilleが約1168年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエンパンガムで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph II De Normanvilleは30歳，母Maud Buresは23歳であった。1194年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエンパンガムでAviciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1225年12月30日に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Normanville(이)가 대략 1168년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 핀그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph II De Normanville(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Bures(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1194년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 핀그함에서 Avicia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1225년 12월 30일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Normanville nasceu aproximadamente 1168, em Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph II De Normanville, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maud Bures, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Avicia em 1194, em Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de dezembro de 1225, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Normanville родился около 1168 г. в местности эмпингхам, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph II De Normanville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Bures, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Avicia в 1194 г. в местности эмпингхам, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 декабря 1225 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Normanville nació aproximadamente 1168, en Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph II De Normanville, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maud Bures, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Avicia en 1194, en Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1225, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
